name: NavigationRail
description: The navigation rail is a compact, icon-first side navigation. It's the collapsed form of the drawer — used on narrower desktop widths or when an operator wants more room for a dense map or table.
keyRule: Use the rail as the space-saving alternative to the drawer, not as a second navigation. The two are the same destinations at different widths.

variants.name: Icon-only
variants.whenToUse: Maximum density; labels via tooltip on hover.

variants.name: Expandable
variants.whenToUse: Toggles to the full navigation drawer.

anatomy.name: Item
anatomy.description: an icon with a short label beneath it.

anatomy.name: Menu / expand control
anatomy.description: optional toggle back to the full drawer.

behaviors.name: Selection
behaviors.description: Selecting an item navigates and moves the active indicator; only one is active.

behaviors.name: Expand
behaviors.description: An optional control expands the rail into the full drawer and back.

behaviors.name: Tooltips
behaviors.description: Icon-only items reveal their label on hover/focus so meaning isn't lost.

props.name: items
props.description: The rail's destinations; must mirror the NavigationDrawer's destinations exactly — the rail is the drawer's collapsed form, not a second nav.

props.name: activeId
props.description: The id of the currently active destination; only one item is active.

props.name: showLabels
props.description: Labelled (icon + short label) vs Icon-only (maximum density, label via tooltip) per the spec's Variants.

props.name: onExpand
props.description: Renders an expand control that toggles the rail into the full navigation drawer and back (the Expandable variant).

props.name: className
props.description: Optional extra class names to compose with the base rail class.

doThis: Keep labels even in the compact form where possible.
dontDoThis: Don't show different destinations than the drawer.
Don't rely on icon alone without an accessible name.
accessibility: A navigation landmark of links; the active item exposes aria-current.
Every item has an accessible name even when icon-only.

related.name: NavigationDrawer
related.why: Expanded destinations with labels and grouping
